legal.draftDescription: HubFit is under development. This text must be reviewed and completed with the real owner, service and commercial-policy details before publication or payment acceptance.

notice.title: Legal notice
notice.introduction: This notice sets out general information about the site and the basic rules governing access to HubFit during its development phase.

owner.title: 1. Site owner
owner.body: HubFit is owned and operated by Javier López Díaz. HubFit is currently a software project under development. The address, tax identification, any applicable registration details and a direct legal contact channel must be added here before the service is commercially released.

purpose.title: 2. Purpose
purpose.body: HubFit provides tools to browse classes, manage bookings and waitlists, and support sports-centre administration. Available features may change while the product remains under development.

intellectualProperty.title: 3. Intellectual and industrial property
intellectualProperty.body: HubFit's design, code, brand, text and other original elements are protected by applicable law. Access does not grant rights to reproduce, distribute, modify or exploit them unless expressly authorised or covered by an applicable licence.

links.title: 4. Third-party links and services
links.body: The application may include third-party links or integrations. HubFit does not control their content, availability or policies, and each external service is governed by its own terms.

liability.title: 5. Availability and liability
liability.body: Continuous availability and error-free operation are not guaranteed during development. HubFit will apply reasonable measures to protect and maintain the service, without excluding liabilities that cannot legally be excluded.

law.title: 6. Applicable law
law.body: The final version must be adapted to the owner's actual activity, location and legal status, as well as the applicable e-commerce, consumer and data-protection rules.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.introduction: These terms describe the intended basis of the relationship between HubFit, sports centres and users. They are not yet final commercial terms.

scope.title: 1. Scope of the service
scope.body: HubFit supports the management of classes, users, trainers, bookings, capacity and waitlists. Each centre may configure parts of the service and is responsible for communicating its schedules, prices and specific rules.

accounts.title: 2. Registration and accounts
accounts.body: Users must provide accurate information and keep their credentials secure. Accounts are personal. Member, trainer and administrator permissions limit the actions available on the platform.

bookings.title: 3. Bookings and waitlists
bookings.body: A booking is subject to capacity and the rules set by the centre. When a place becomes available, the system may automatically promote the first person on the waitlist. The centre must disclose any additional attendance or priority rules.

payments.title: 4. Payments and plans
payments.body: Commercial payments are not enabled in this version of HubFit. Before Stripe or another provider is added, prices, taxes, invoicing, renewals, refunds and responsibilities among HubFit, the centre and the payment provider must be defined. HubFit will not store full card details.

cancellations.title: 5. Cancellations and termination
cancellations.body: Cancellation policies for classes, fees or subscriptions must be shown before a purchase or booking. The final version will explain deadlines, consequences, refunds and ways to cancel the service.

changes.title: 6. Changes to these terms
changes.body: The terms may be updated when features or laws change. Material changes must be communicated clearly and, where appropriate, require renewed acceptance.

law.title: 7. Law and dispute resolution
law.body: Applicable law, competent courts and complaint mechanisms will be specified according to the owner's real location and activity, while always respecting mandatory consumer rights.

use.title: Conditions of use
use.introduction: These rules explain how to use HubFit safely and responsibly when managing classes, bookings and community activities.

access.title: 1. Access and security
access.body: Do not share credentials or attempt to access accounts, features or data without authorisation. Report suspicious activity and keep your account information up to date.

acceptableUse.title: 2. Acceptable use
acceptableUse.body: You may not interfere with the service, automate abusive requests, introduce malicious code, impersonate others, extract data without authorisation or use HubFit for unlawful activity.

bookings.title: 3. Responsible booking
bookings.body: Only book classes you reasonably expect to attend and cancel within the notice period set by the centre. Repeated misuse of bookings or waitlists may lead to proportionate restrictions that have been communicated in advance.

community.title: 4. Content and community
community.body: If comments are enabled, they must be used respectfully. Harassment, discrimination, threats, unlawful content and the publication of third-party personal data without permission are not allowed.

health.title: 5. Health and physical activity
health.body: HubFit organises information and bookings but does not provide medical advice. Each person must assess their health, follow professional guidance and inform the centre of relevant limitations before taking part in an activity.

availability.title: 6. Service availability
availability.body: Maintenance and interruptions may occur. Important bookings and changes must have suitable confirmation and recovery mechanisms before production use.

suspension.title: 7. Access suspension
suspension.body: Access may be restricted because of security risks, fraud, serious breaches or legal requirements. Measures must be proportionate and provide information and review options where appropriate.

profilePhoto.title: Profile photo
profilePhoto.description: This image identifies your account inside HubFit. It is separate from the official platform logo and the gym logo.
profilePhoto.saved: Your profile photo has been updated.
profilePhoto.saveError: The profile photo could not be saved.
profilePhoto.invalidType: Choose a PNG, JPEG or WebP image.

security.title: Security and sign-in
security.description: Control two-step verification, signed-in devices and recent account activity.
security.twoFactorDescription: Require a temporary authenticator-app code in addition to your password.
security.passkeyDescription: Enable a passkey to sign in using device protection instead of typing your password.
security.passkeyPrivacy: Your fingerprint or face is verified on the device and is never sent to or stored by HubFit.
security.passkeyUnavailable: This browser or device does not currently provide a compatible built-in authenticator.
security.passkeyEnabledSuccess: The device passkey has been enabled.
security.setupReady: Scan the code and confirm the setup.
security.qrAlt: QR code for authenticator app setup
security.scanHelp: Scan the QR with a TOTP-compatible app. If scanning is unavailable, enter the displayed key manually.
security.codesRegenerated: New recovery codes have been generated.
security.codesShownOnce: Each code works once and will not be shown again. Store them outside HubFit.
security.downloadWarning: Store this file securely. Each code can only be used once.
security.sessionsDescription: Review where your account is open and close any access you do not recognise.
security.otherSessionsRevoked: The other sessions have been closed.
security.activityDescription: Recent changes and attempts related to access to your account.
security.noActivity: There is no security activity yet.

feedback.title: Help us improve HubFit
feedback.description: Tell us what works, what is difficult to use or what we could improve. Your message is linked to your account so it can be investigated.
feedback.placeholder: Describe your experience in as much detail as possible...
feedback.sent: Thank you. We received your feedback.
feedback.error: We could not send it. Please try again.

unauthorized.title: Access denied
unauthorized.description: You don't have permission to access this page. Your current role doesn't allow you to view this content.
